# WindowSpec.Closable property

When true the chrome draws a ✕ close glyph that hides the window. Defaults false (plugin windows manage their own visibility). Independent of [`Draggable`](./Draggable.md) so a window can be draggable without a close button (e.g. the Settings hub).

```csharp
public bool Closable { get; set; }
```
